post.description: Authenticate a user with username and password. Returns user info. A short-lived token is set as an HTTP-only cookie named `mysagra_token` (6 hours).

200.description: Authentication successful. Access token returned in body; refresh token set as HTTP-only cookie.

400.description: Bad request — missing or invalid fields

post.description: Revoke the refresh token to terminate the current session. The token is read automatically from the `refreshToken` HTTP-only cookie.

400.description: Bad request — refresh token missing or malformed

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or expired refresh token

get.description: Returns all categories with optional filtering by availability and optional inclusion of foods. If `available=true` is specified the endpoint is public; otherwise admin authentication is required.

put.description: Updates a category. Changing `available` also updates all associated foods' availability. Changing `printerId` (or setting it to null) propagates to all associated foods.

patch.description: Partially updates a category. Changing `available` or `printerId` propagates to all associated foods.

get.description:
Establishes a persistent SSE connection to receive real-time updates for the specified channel.

**Keep-alive** messages are sent every 15 seconds as `: keep-alive\n\n`.
**Data** messages are sent as `data: {JSON}\n\n`.

---

### `cashier` channel
- **`new-order`** — Fired when a new order is placed. Payload: full order object (`SSEOrder`).
- **`confirmed-order`** — Fired when an order is confirmed. Payload: `SSEConfirmedOrderSummary`.

### `display` channel
- **`confirmed-order`** — Fired when an order is confirmed. Payload: `SSEConfirmedOrderSummary`.

### `printer` channel
- **`confirmed-order`** — Fired when an order is confirmed (includes food details for printing). Payload: full order object (`SSEOrder`).
- **`reprint-order`** — Fired when a reprint is requested. Payload: `SSEReprintOrder`.

200.description: SSE stream established. Connection stays open until the client disconnects.

get.description: Returns all food items with optional filtering by availability, category and ingredient inclusion. Non-admin users can only access foods with `available=true`.
Returns a paginated and filtered list of orders. Use `GET /v1/orders/{id}` for full order details.

post.description: Creates a new order in PENDING status. If `confirm` data is provided the order is immediately confirmed and a ticket number is assigned.

get.description: Returns the complete order with items grouped by category, including full food and ingredient details.

post.description: Confirms a PENDING order, assigns a ticket number and stores payment information.

400.description: Invalid input or order already confirmed

patch.description: Updates the operational status of a printer (ONLINE, OFFLINE, ERROR).
